# Document Extraction Module

Module ID: document-extraction
Status: draft
Purpose: Local-first scanned document extraction with schema-normalized drafts,
human review, source evidence, and governed Gemma/AI fallback.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build

Use cases:
- Create extraction jobs for uploaded/scanned files.
- Submit extracted drafts from browser OCR/local LLM, ai-gateway, or sidecar runtimes.
- Review and approve/reject extracted output before writing business records.

Model boundary:
- Use `createGemmaExtractionNormalizer` for OCR-text-to-schema normalization.
- Use `ai-gateway` Gemma adapters for Ollama or OpenAI-compatible Gemma 4 endpoints.
- Do not silently download models or bypass human review.
